title: SectionCompact
description: A *section* is a subdivision of a project that groups tasks together. It can either be a header above a list of tasks in a list view or a column in a board view of a project.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

name.description: The name of the section (i.e. the text displayed as the section header).
